message:
fix: inline mdn-data JSON files to fix compiled binary crash on launch

The compiled binary crashed with "Cannot find module 'mdn-data/css/at-rules.json'
from '/$bunfs/root/s2p'" because css-tree uses createRequire() + require() to load
mdn-data JSON files at runtime, which Bun's compiler cannot embed into its virtual
filesystem ($bunfs). The postinstall patch script now inlines these three JSON files
(at-rules.json, properties.json, syntaxes.json) directly into css-tree/lib/data.js,
eliminating the dynamic require() calls.

Uses line-by-line splicing instead of String.prototype.replace() to avoid '$' in
CSS syntax strings being interpreted as replacement string special characters.

Closes #4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
